content.cn_text: 雅思听力版本 56658
content.en_text: IELTS LISTENING Version 56658

content.cn_text: 你将听到几段不同的录音，并需要根据所听内容回答问题。
content.en_text: You will hear a number of different recordings, and you will have to answer questions on what

content.cn_text: 你所听到的内容。
content.en_text: you hear.

content.cn_text: 你会有时间阅读说明和题目，也会有机会
content.en_text: There will be time for you to read the instructions and questions, and you will have a chance to

content.cn_text: 检查你的答案。
content.en_text: check your work.

content.cn_text: 所有录音只播放一遍。
content.en_text: All the recordings will be played once only.

content.cn_text: 考试分为四个部分。
content.en_text: The test is in four parts.

content.cn_text: 请将所有答案写在听力题册上。
content.en_text: Write all your answers in the listening question booklet.

content.cn_text: 考试结束时，你将有十分钟时间把答案誊写到
content.en_text: At the end of the test, you will be given ten minutes to transfer your answers to an

content.cn_text: 答题卡上。
content.en_text: answer sheet.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到题册第2页第一部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to part one on page two of your question booklet.

content.cn_text: 第一部分。
content.en_text: Part one.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一名青少年咨询加入电影俱乐部的事。
content.en_text: You will hear a teenager asking about joining a film club.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间浏览第1至第4题。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions one to four.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第1至第4题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions one to four.

content.cn_text: Staff：你好，有什么可以帮你？
content.en_text: Staff: Hi, can I help you?

content.cn_text: Teenager：是的，我在网上看到你们电影院这里有一个电影俱乐部，但上面
content.en_text: Teenager: Yeah, I saw on the internet that you have a film club here at the cinema, but there

content.cn_text: 关于它的信息不多。
content.en_text: wasn't a lot about it.

content.cn_text: 你能多告诉我一些吗？
content.en_text: Can you tell me a bit more?

content.cn_text: Staff：可以，我们还在搭建网页，不好意思。
content.en_text: Staff: Yes, we're still setting up the web page, sorry about that.

content.cn_text: 我们几个月前才成立这个俱乐部。
content.en_text: We only started the club a few months ago.

content.cn_text: 它从一开始就很受欢迎。
content.en_text: It's been very popular right from the beginning.

content.cn_text: 我们有定期电影放映，还有很多其他福利。
content.en_text: We have regular film showings and there are lots of other benefits.

content.cn_text: Teenager：俱乐部多久聚一次？
content.en_text: Teenager: How often does the club meet?

content.cn_text: Staff：每两周一次，在星期四晚上。
content.en_text: Staff: Every two weeks, on Thursday nights.

content.cn_text: Teenager：好的，我16岁，所以我可以加入吗？
content.en_text: Teenager: Okay, and I'm 16, so could I join?

content.cn_text: Staff：当然，任何年龄的人都可以加入。
content.en_text: Staff: Sure, people of any age can join.

content.cn_text: Teenager：好的，那加入需要多少钱？
content.en_text: Teenager: Right, so how much does it cost to join?

content.cn_text: Staff：这个要看情况。
content.en_text: Staff: Well it depends.

content.cn_text: 普通费用是每季24英镑，但符合优惠资格的人是21.50英镑。
content.en_text: The basic charge is £24 a season, but for people eligible for concessions it's £21.50.

content.cn_text: Teenager：我是学生。
content.en_text: Teenager: I'm a student.

content.cn_text: Staff：那你可以享受优惠价。
content.en_text: Staff: You'd get the concession rate then.

content.cn_text: Teenager：那很好。
content.en_text: Teenager: That's good.

content.cn_text: Staff：这让你可以免费观看俱乐部电影，还可以在影院其他所有电影票上减免2英镑。
content.en_text: Staff: That entitles you to free entry to the club films and also to £2 off tickets for all

content.cn_text: 所以你会付4.50英镑，而不是6.50英镑。
content.en_text: other films on at the cinema, so you'd pay £4.50 instead of £6.50.

content.cn_text: Teenager：太好了，好的。
content.en_text: Teenager: Great, okay.

content.cn_text: Staff：我不知道这是否适用于你，但俱乐部会员还可以享受三小时免费
content.en_text: Staff: Now I don't know if this applies to you, but club members are also eligible for three

content.cn_text: 电影放映期间的免费停车。
content.en_text: hours complimentary parking when there's a film on.

content.cn_text: Teenager：我不开车，但我女朋友开车，所以这可能有用。
content.en_text: Teenager: I don't drive, but my girlfriend does, so it might be useful, yes.

content.cn_text: 好的，那我肯定想加入。
content.en_text: Okay, well I'd definitely like to join.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间浏览第5至第10题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions 5-10.

content.cn_text: 现在请听录音，并回答第5至第10题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 5-10.

content.cn_text: Teenager：你能告诉我接下来几部放映电影的信息吗？
content.en_text: Teenager: Can you give me any information about the next few films you're showing?

content.cn_text: Staff：恐怕我们这一季的宣传单已经发完了，所以我来告诉你接下来
content.en_text: Staff: I'm afraid we've run out of leaflets for this season, so I'll tell you about the next

content.cn_text: 几部电影的信息，希望我们很快会把所有细节放到网上。
content.en_text: few films and hopefully we'll have all the details on the internet soon.

content.cn_text: 下一次聚会是本周四，10月14日，放映的电影叫 Pablo。
content.en_text: So the next meeting's this Thursday, October the 14th, and that's a film called Pablo.

content.cn_text: Teenager：哦，我读过它的评论。
content.en_text: Teenager: Oh, I read the reviews of that.

content.cn_text: 它的背景设在阿根廷，对吗？
content.en_text: It's set in Argentina, isn't it?

content.cn_text: 讲的是一个离家出走的孩子？
content.en_text: About a child who's run away from home?

content.cn_text: Staff：没错。
content.en_text: Staff: That's right.

content.cn_text: 它最近才上映。
content.en_text: It just came out recently.

content.cn_text: Teenager：那个孩子不知怎么上了电视，还赢了一个舞蹈比赛之类的。
content.en_text: Teenager: And the kid somehow gets on TV and he wins a dance competition or something.

content.cn_text: Staff：是歌唱比赛，对。
content.en_text: Staff: A singing competition, yeah.

content.cn_text: 我也还没看过，但海报上是这么写的。
content.en_text: I haven't seen it either, but it tells you on the posters.

content.cn_text: Teenager：是的，听起来真的不错。
content.en_text: Teenager: Yes, it sounds really good.

content.cn_text: 我肯定想看那部。
content.en_text: Well, I definitely want to see that.

content.cn_text: 之后放什么？
content.en_text: What's on after that?

content.cn_text: Staff：10月28日，有一部美国电影叫 The Soldier。
content.en_text: Staff: On October the 28th, there's an American film called The Soldier.

content.cn_text: 那是一部老默片，但这次放映时会有人用
content.en_text: That's an old silent movie, but in this showing we have someone who will accompany it on

content.cn_text: 钢琴伴奏。
content.en_text: the piano.

content.cn_text: 就像老电影院过去那样，虽然那时候有时是管风琴伴奏。
content.en_text: Just like they used to in the old cinemas, though it was sometimes an organ accompaniment

content.cn_text: 在那些年代。
content.en_text: in those days.

content.cn_text: Teenager：那它一定是很老的电影了。
content.en_text: Teenager: It must be a pretty old film, then.

content.cn_text: 第一批有声电影是什么时候发行的，1926年还是1927年？
content.en_text: When did they release the first talkies, 1926 or 27?

content.cn_text: Staff：是的，这部电影是在1922年制作的，所以早得多，不过我觉得他们已经有短篇有声电影
content.en_text: Staff: Yes, this was made in 1922, so well before, though I think they had short feature films

content.cn_text: 实际上到1923年就有了。
content.en_text: with sound by 1923, actually.

content.cn_text: Teenager：那它是什么类型的电影？
content.en_text: Teenager: So what sort of film is it?

content.cn_text: Staff：它被宣传为一部喜剧，虽然从片名看你会以为它是战争片。
content.en_text: Staff: Well, it's billed as a comedy, though you'd think it was a war film from the title.

content.cn_text: 我不太了解剧情，我们没有太多信息，不过你总可以
content.en_text: I don't know much about the plot, we don't have much information, but you could always

content.cn_text: 上网查一下。
content.en_text: look it up on the internet.

content.cn_text: Teenager：好，我会查的。
content.en_text: Teenager: Yeah, I'll do that.

content.cn_text: Staff：再下一部电影是，看看，11月11日，是一部关于动物的电影，
content.en_text: Staff: Then the next film after that, so that'll be, let's see, the 11th of November is a film

content.cn_text: 片名就叫 Tiger。
content.en_text: about animals, and it's just called Tiger.

content.cn_text: 这是一部动画电影，听起来好像是给孩子看的，但实际上
content.en_text: And that's a cartoon film, which makes it sound as if it's for children, but actually

content.cn_text: 它面向成年人，有些地方真的挺吓人。
content.en_text: it's aimed at adults, and it's really quite frightening in places.

content.cn_text: 它刚上映时我看过。
content.en_text: I saw it when it first came out.

content.cn_text: Teenager：它讲什么？
content.en_text: Teenager: What's it about?

content.cn_text: Staff：里面完全没有人类，只讲环境变化对
content.en_text: Staff: It's got no humans in it at all, it's just about the effect of environmental changes

content.cn_text: 几百万年前生活的动物产生的影响。
content.en_text: millions of years ago on the animals who lived then.

content.cn_text: 这是一部非常奇特的电影。
content.en_text: It's a really strange film.

content.cn_text: 之后会有导演做一个讲座，所以应该会很受欢迎。
content.en_text: There's a talk afterwards given by the directors, so that should be very popular.

content.cn_text: 我觉得你需要早点预订。
content.en_text: You'll need to book early for that, I should think.

content.cn_text: Teenager：好的。
content.en_text: Teenager: Right.

content.cn_text: 非常感谢这些信息。
content.en_text: Well, thanks for all that.

content.cn_text: 现在，如果你能给我申请表，第一部分到此结束。
content.en_text: Now, if you can give me the application form, that is the end of part one.

content.cn_text: 你现在有一分钟时间检查第一部分的答案。
content.en_text: You now have one minute to check your answers to part one.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–10

items.title: No 1. __________ limit
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问 No ______ limit，原文说 people of any age can join，所以没有 age limit，答案是 age。

items.title: Student membership costs 2. £________ per season
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 Student membership costs £______ per season。学生享受 concession rate，原文为 £21.50，所以答案是 21.50。£24 是普通价格。

items.title: 3. £________ reduction on other films at cinema
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 Members get £______ reduction on other films，原文说 £2 off tickets，所以答案是 2。£4.50 和 £6.50 是折后价和原价。

items.title: Members are entitled to 3 hours’ free 4. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 Members are entitled to 3 hours' free ______，原文说 complimentary parking，所以答案是 parking。

items.title: about a child in 5. __________ who runs away from home and wins
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 Pablo 是 about a child in ______，原文说 set in Argentina，所以答案是 Argentina。

items.title: a 6. __________ competition on TV
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 wins a ______ competition on TV。对方先误说 dance，工作人员纠正为 singing competition，所以答案是 singing。

items.title: with live 7. __________ accompaniment
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 The Soldier with live ______ accompaniment，原文说 accompany it on the piano，所以答案是 piano。organ 是过去有时使用的伴奏乐器。

items.title: made in the year 8. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 made in the year ______，原文明确说 this was made in 1922。1926/27 和 1923 都是其他时间信息。

items.title: type of film: a 9. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 type of film，原文说 billed as a comedy，所以答案是 comedy。war film 是根据标题可能产生的误解。

items.title: followed by a 10. __________ by the director
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 followed by a ______ by the director，原文说 a talk afterwards given by the directors，所以答案是 talk。

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Film club
Membership information
• Club meets every 2 weeks
• No $1$ limit
• Student membership costs 2. £________ per season
• Members get:
• free entry to club films
• 3. £________ reduction on other films at cinema
• Members are entitled to 3 hours’ free $4$
Films to be shown:
Oct 14: Pablo
• about a child in $5$ who runs away from home and wins
• a $6$ competition on TV
Oct 28: The Soldier
• with live $7$ accompaniment
• made in the year $8$
• type of film: a $9$
Nov 11: Tiger
• cartoon aimed at adults
• followed by a $10$ by the director
Q2: $2$
Q3: $3$
